In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Ghost Attack on Sutton Street: Poltergeists and Paranormal Entities
programme.desc: Expert Ghost Hunters from Haunted Events UK search for life-after death in the notoriously haunted Old Street Market of Sutton Town in historic old England. The area is so haunted that within minutes the investigation's medium is contacted by not one, but four spirits, warning them not to split up or risk their lives.Ignoring the advice, they split into two teams. The first team lead by UK Paranormal Expert Lee Roberts, comes face to face with the child murderer named Tap Tap, who taunts them with noises and poltergeist activity. Team two uses thermal imaging cameras to pick up humanoid forms and warm hand prints, further witnessing their devices shockingly moved before their eyes, chairs tipping over, tables levitating, glasses thrown and doors slamming. The nightbecomes so terrifying that the hunt is called off, but not before one final terrifying incident. You have never witnessed a ghost hunt like this before. Blair Witch was a movie. This is real. Prepare yourselves for the most shocking Ghost Hunt ever recorded.

programme.title: 3:15 AM
programme.desc: LONG - Horror strikes at 3:15 AM in ways never before imagined. Truth is stranger than fiction in this euro horror anthology that opens a new dimension in sheer terror. This cutting edge horror anthology from France will curl your toes and rattle your soul.

programme.title: Paranormal Prisons: Portal to Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Who is the bloody figure wielding a meat cleaver, seen racing through the alleys of British Columbia’s Chinatown? Whoever he is, he has terrified dozens of witnesses, who have never been the same afterwards. The brutal history of Cornwall Jail, Ottawa’s most notorious prison, lives on as ghostly apparitions of tortured inmates terrorize modern visitors. In its heyday it was home to vicious criminals, and sadistic guards. Hangings, whippings and torture were daily affairs and spirits from that era still linger on in the maze of cell blocks and corridors. Many male criminals were hanged at the Northwest Mounted Police outpost known as Fort Saskatchewan, but only one woman. Florence Lassandro was dubbed the Mob Princess, and her spirit is one of many seen on the grounds and in the preserved buildings of this historic site. Journey through several of the world's most haunted prisons and experience real portals to hell on earth.

programme.title: California Paranormal
programme.desc: SHORT - (Cable / Digital) California is a weird place, but just how weird can best be told by residents with bone chilling true stories of Paranormal and Supernatural encounters that defy description - from Alien visitations to Poltergeist manifestations that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Wendigo Demonic Evil
programme.desc: All over the world, strange yet true cannibal attacks have been occurring all whilst Zombies, Werewolves and Vampires are more popular than ever. The end times are truly here according to experts. Forensic Psychologysts, Historians and Medical Engineers weigh in on possible explanations behind "Cannibal Possessions" and the legendary and mysterious "Wendigo".

programme.desc: Master filmmaker Sidney Lumet (The Verdict, Dog Day Afternoon, Serpico) delivers "one of his greatest achievements" (Roger Ebert) with this riveting and compelling suspense thriller. Oscar®-winner* Philip Seymour Hoffman (Capote) is Andy, an overextended payroll executive who lures his younger brother, Hank (Ethan Hawke, Training Day), into a larcenous scheme: the pair will rob a suburban mom-and-pop jewelry store that appears to be the quintessential easy target. The problem is, the store owners are Andy and Hank's real mom and pop, and when the seemingly perfect crime goes awry, the damage sends them hurtling toward a shattering clash that may obliterate their already precarious lives.

A group of Chicago real-estate salesmen-cum-con artists live on the edge. Life is good for the one on a roll. For the rest, life hangs in the balance. There is no room for losers. A-B-C: Always Be Closing, sell or go under, is the salesman's mantra. With the pressure on, so begins a rainy night of cutthroat business and shattered lives.

programme.desc: Join us as we boat down some of America’s best beaches in Pinellas County, Florida. From Anclote Key to Fort Desoto Park, we island-hop, kayak, bike & explore culinary delights.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Jenn and Lanny to take a deep dive into last night’s mission. If it wasn’t difficult enough to do a full day of Surviving Mann training, an overnight mission with no breaks seems to be the cherry on top. After a refreshing 2 hours of sleep, the contestants were back at it with an Olympic-level PT session hosted by Lanny. From there, Jen fills us in on a secret new product in the next episode of Surviving Mann that reminds her of... Fembots? Stay tuned.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 6 kicks off with some much anticipated weapons training and tactical shooting. Armed with some killer Black Aces shotguns, the teams are challenged with a unique course of fire. From there, Athlon Optics and Modern Pneumatic Sporting Devices configure a hunting air rifle for the contestants to play with.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Kyle and Caleb give the skinny on the hamstring pull that was heard around the world. From there, Surviving Mann fans get a glimpse at just how far Faraday containers can go to protect your security, privacy and device. After, Black Aces does a deep dive into their available products and some exciting plans for the future.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wildshots, host Tim Harmsen heads to Sig Sauer for an exclusive look inside one of America’s most advanced firearms manufacturing facilities. With a motto of “Every day you wake up and get a little better,” Sig Sauer lives up to its words—producing over 5,000 firearms a day with cutting-edge robotics and precision automation. After a full factory tour, Tim hits Sig’s state-of-the-art testing range to get hands-on with the legendary XM250 machine gun, pushing the limits of modern firepower. Then it’s time for some pure shooting mastery as Tim meets up with friend and firearms influencer 22Plinkster. Known for his unbelievable accuracy and showmanship, 22Plinkster ups the ante—splitting playing cards with a .22 bullet, upside down, and even splitting a single bullet mid-flight to hit two separate targets at once. Finally, the episode caps off with a nod to Hollywood as Tim checks out the Genesis Arms machinery seen in John Wick, blending cinematic cool with real-world firepower.

programme.title: Mark of the Avenger 1938
programme.desc: A masked rider seeks revenge against a ruthless outlaw gang responsible for his family’s downfall, striking from the shadows to bring justice to the frontier

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Rough Riders’ Round-up (1939)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy sets out to uncover the truth behind a series of stagecoach robberies, posing as an outlaw to infiltrate the gang and bring the criminals to justice while protecting the innocent

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A determined rancher and his allies stand up against a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of valuable land near Saddle Mountain. As tensions rise, courage and quick thinking are put to the test in a battle to protect rightful ownership and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Lightnin' Bill Carson
programme.desc: A lawman captures the notorious "Pecos Kid", who is tried and hanged for his crimes--then starts to have doubts as to whether the Kid actually committed the crimes.

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw
programme.desc: Dan Ward, reformed and last member of an outlaw family, meets Molly Clark in a rocky draw near town. Ted Wells, a henchman for Dan's enemy Jim Swain, attempts to shoot Dan but is outdrawn and killed by the latter. Molly disappears and Dan learns that she and Wells had ridden there together.

programme.title: Utah 1945
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Utah, a lively mix of song, romance, and Western action! When a city socialite inherits a sprawling ranch, she plans to sell it off—until Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers step in to show her the true value of life on the range. With scheming villains, sweeping landscapes, and plenty of toe-tapping tunes, this Roy Rogers classic proves that the West is as rich in heart as it is in land.

programme.title: Code Of The Cactus 1939
programme.desc: In Code of the Cactus, cowboy hero Tim McCoy rides into action when a greedy gang plots to seize control of the stagecoach line. With fast-draw courage and sharp wits, he takes on the outlaws to protect the frontier’s lifeline. Filled with hard-riding action, shootouts, and frontier justice, this thrilling Western proves the West was won by men who lived by a code as tough as the cactus itself.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Silver Skate
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Luke and Haley make Alex participate in her senior ditch day; Claire gets an offer to work for a big hotel chain, but is unsure what to do; and, as Manny recovers from a wisdom tooth extraction, Gloria schemes to break him and his new flame up.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family gathers to celebrate Alex's graduation, minus Phil, who, after getting stuck in Seattle, has found a way to attend using Skype and a robot; Claire tries to find a great gift for Alex; Mitch keeps the news that he was laid off a secret.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley tries to stop Andy from proposing to Beth, which forces herself and Andy to come to terms with their real emotions; Phil and Claire try to help Haley and Andy, but they only complicate matters; Cam attempts to get Mitch to return to work.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are hurt when Alex tells them the wrong college move-in date; Luke would rather hang out with his friends than stay with Phil at his open house; the family makes up a story so they will not have to attend Lily's soccer game.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil decides to convince Claire that Dylan should temporarily move in with them, but when he sees Dylan getting too close to Haley, he begins to rethink his idea; Mitch works as a consultant for a store that competes against Jay's store.
